TC-NFR-S5-002-01.description: Validate single field, verify completes within 100ms

TC-NFR-S5-002-03.description: Generate SHACL shape for 20-field form, verify ≤1 second

TC-NFR-S5-002-04.description: Type in field, verify validation debounced (not triggered on every keystroke)

TC-NFR-S5-002-05.description: Validation error message, verify includes specific SHACL constraint reference

TC-NFR-S5-002-06.description: Validate field twice without changes, verify uses cached result (faster)
